item.title: Goodbye my love
item.description: My wife is now at peace. No more pain. After 1000+ lab results, 100+ operations and countless sleepless nights. And 7 years of fearing this Day. Now Im gonna look to the future and love my two daughters like there is no tomorrow. But there is, there is a tomorrow and its gonna be Ok.
item.dc:creator: mlembacon

item.dc:creator: jasonPositivityPilot

item.title: I'm so sorry!
item.description: I have had a nasal polyp slowly decreasing my sense of smell for the last 3 years. I finally had it removed yesterday. OMG, all the smells. So many things have smells and I had forgotten. I shower everyday and always apply deodorant and clean clothes before work. I had no idea I was the smelly coworker until I work up this morning to the smell of hot garbage/ spoiled milk. After 10 minutes of searching I found it was coming from the lining of my Columbia jacket. I wear this to work everyday. I am so sorry!
item.dc:creator: TheGarbageManwich

item.title: What happened in Texas yesterday is not a surprise. Violent antisemitism is all too common and almost never gets discussed in public.

item.title: They made a "Mistake"
item.description: Man they where looking for: White 49-years old 5'11 Man they arrested: Black 23-years old 5'7 Well at least it only took them a week with him in jail to bring him to a judge that could figure it out.
